entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2024 under the Backpack brand, offering spot and derivatives-oriented trading through jurisdiction-specific regulated entities and regional platforms.
entity.notes: The previous seed description is replaced with a reviewed entity summary. The 2024 year-level launch and United Arab Emirates origin are retained because current first-party materials support active exchange operation and regional entity structure but do not establish a more precise global launch date suitable for canonical correction.

expected.summary: Crypto exchange candidate from the CCXT-supported exchange list and official Backpack Exchange domain. HEI records it as an active centralized exchange seed because it has an official trading-domain identity beyond a single database row.
